dealSummary: CuspAI, a UK-based startup using AI to discover new materials, is raising $400 million from investors including Kleiner Perkins and Bezos Expeditions at a $2.6 billion valuation, the Financial Times reported.
Odyssey, a developer of physical AI models, raised a $310 million Series B from investors including Amazon, Nvidia and AMD.
Fintech startup Karta, which provides a credit card for international travelers, raised $140 million, which includes a $15 million Series A led by Galaxy Ventures and a $125 million credit facility.
leadInvestors: Galaxy Ventures, a $125 million credit facility

dealSummary: Twenty, which develops offensive cyber warfare software, secured a $100 million Series B led by Accel at a $1 billion valuation.
Biotech startup Triveni Bio received a $65 million Series C led by Ascenta Capital and Janus Henderson Investors.
Convey, the developer of a business operations automation platform, secured a $38 million Series A led by Andreessen Horowitz.
Audit and compliance automation startup Andera raised a $37 million Series A, Axios reported.
French defense tech specialist Comand AI raised a €32 million Series A led by Blossom Capital.
Traysar, which specializes in subterranean defense tech, raised a $25 million seed round led by Silent Ventures.
NeuralTrust, a Barcelona-based developer of a platform to secure AI agents, received a $20 million seed investment led by Alstin Capital.
